readyToCommitScope: Final WP2 evidence pack and partial local upgrade-contract groundwork. Not production SaaS readiness and not completed live LanceDB or pgvector migration.

relatedRepos.role: Enterprise/Fortress private runtime and vector DB path
Cloud/control-plane licence, entitlement, download, registration, heartbeat, and support path

scoutOpenCore: Older scout-n8n-node route aligned to POST /api/v1/events/source-system?tenantSlug=<tenant>.
Public local storage adapter boundary and safe scout-postgres default exist.
Scout relational export and dry-run validation exist for source events, user signals, selector executions, context facts, provenance metadata, and audit events.
Scout open-core still does not claim native LanceDB, pgvector, vectors, relationship sets, attribution paths, outcome events, or private import.
enterpriseFortress: ucl-vector includes the 2026-06-18.scout-lancedb-import.v1 local import validation and WriteRequest mapping contract.
Focused tests cover local data-boundary rejection, tenant/layer checks, embedding dimension and finite-value checks, citation/provenance requirements, and safe metadata.
cloudControlPlane: Cloud Scout to Fortress/Elite upgrade onboarding is documented as metadata-only control-plane flow.
A docs guard checks the Cloud upgrade onboarding document and forbidden customer-data families.
finalPack: Final review, investor-safe summary, customer-safe summary, next-work-package recommendations, README, handoff, and machine-readable status are persisted.

currentStatuses.upgradePath: Partially implemented and evidence-ready; not production complete.
currentStatuses.connectorRouting: Current source-system event route is aligned; canonical data-item and relationship-input write routing remains future work.
currentStatuses.migrationTooling: Scout export and dry-run validation exist; operator CLI and private Enterprise/Fortress importer are missing.
currentStatuses.lanceDbImport: Enterprise/Fortress validation/mapping contract exists; live LanceDB/native-store and pgvector proof are missing.
currentStatuses.cloudEntitlement: Metadata-only onboarding flow is documented and guarded; dedicated onboarding entity, atomic tier-move endpoint, and production signed binary proof remain open.
currentStatuses.dataBoundary: Cloud remains commercial/control-plane metadata only; customer data and derived intelligence remain local by default.

finalVerification.result: passed; LF-to-CRLF working-copy warnings on 09-final-review.md and status.json only

knownPriorVerificationNotes: Enterprise cargo test -p ucl-vector, cargo fetch --locked, cargo build --workspace, and cargo test --workspace previously passed in WP2 with existing warnings recorded in 06-enterprise-lancedb-import-contract.md.
Cloud dotnet restore and dotnet build previously passed in WP2; full solution test previously had one unrelated existing AnalyticsPixelTests failure due googletagmanager marketing code.
Fresh Scout SQLite bootstrap previously passed in WP2; live temp API ingest smoke stayed partial because seeded recompute work timed out before event post completion.
skippedProof: Docker/PostgreSQL proof was not run because KYNTIC_RUN_EXTERNAL_DOTNET_TESTS was not set.
Browser/Playwright proof was not run because KYNTIC_RUN_BROWSER_TESTS was not set.
Native vector, LanceDB, pgvector, and model-runtime proof were not run because the relevant opt-in env vars were not set.
Hosted endpoint, Stripe, SMTP, object-store, vendor sandbox, and live connector proof were not run.
xhigh review gates were not run and remain required before pilot, release, or investor-visible technical proof.
openRisks: Scout operator migration CLI wrapper is not implemented.
Private Enterprise/Fortress importer CLI/API is not implemented.
Local embedding generation is not wired into a resumable importer.
Live LanceDB/native-store proof is not complete.
pgvector fallback proof is not complete.
Relationship-set, attribution-path, outcome-event, exact-data-item, governed JSON handoff, checkpoint, retry, dead-letter, and rollback proof remain future work.
Fresh Scout install plus live localhost API ingest needs a deterministic harness because current demo startup can run long recompute work.
Cloud dedicated upgrade onboarding entity and atomic Scout/Fortress/Elite tier-move endpoint do not exist yet.
Production signed binary delivery remains blocked on private object-storage proof.
xhigh review gates remain required for security-sensitive public API, connector-contract, data-model, storage-boundary, Rust engine, and Cloud entitlement changes.

recommendedNextWorkPackage.name: WP3 Scout Operator Migration CLI And Deterministic Local Upgrade Harness
recommendedNextWorkPackage.prompt: Implement the Scout operator migration CLI wrapper that runs ILocalDataPlaneStorageAdapter.ExportAsync dry runs and real exports with checkpoint resume, writes local validation reports and batch files, and adds a deterministic local upgrade simulation harness. Keep Cloud out of the data plane and keep Enterprise/Fortress import behind the private local contract.

include: Enterprise/Fortress ucl-vector Scout import contract files if committing the full WP2 code/docs batch
Cloud upgrade onboarding docs/tests if committing the full WP2 code/docs batch
commitGuidance.caveat: Do not label this commit as production migration complete.
